title: easy Speedruntimer
description: This is a little easy Timer Datapack for speedruning minecraft
body:
# Easy Speedruntimer

This is an easy und uncomplicated Timer, just paste the datpack into your datapack folder and the timer starts. This has no controls, for a Timer with a better interface, download this timer [https://modrinth.com/datapack/timer-datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/timer-datapack). The Easy Timer is little to be uncomplicated!
